title: Normalize trailing slash parsing for config loader
summary: Config loader rejects valid paths ending in a slash.
contributionGuide: Small bugfix PRs with tests are welcome.
expectedBehavior: A directory path ending with a slash loads successfully.
actualBehavior: The loader strips the final segment and raises file not found.
reproductionSteps: Create a config path ending with '/'.
Run the config loader against the path.
Observe file not found even though the directory exists.
patchOutline: Normalize the path before basename extraction.
Preserve the final directory segment when the path ends with a slash.
Add a regression test for trailing slash input.
prHint: Fix trailing slash normalization in config loader.
